title: Visible is safe. Visible is allowed.
subtitle: A short affirmation for making peace with being seen when things go well financially.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 18 of the MONEY program. Use any time visibility around money, success, or wealth triggers a pull to shrink or hide.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 18 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-sentence affirmation from Day 18 of the MONEY program. It targets the deep pattern of making yourself invisible around money: keeping wins quiet, dodging money questions, treating wealth as something that needs to stay hidden.
Visible is safe. Visible is allowed.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart if that helps it land. It works as a pre-event anchor too: say it three times before any situation where your finances or success might come up.
Adapted from Day 18 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
